Schnittstelle ISysexMessageListener

Alle bekannten Implementierungsklassen:
AInstrument
public interface ISysexMessageListener
Classes implementing this interface can register with MidiInterfaces in order to receive system exclusive messages.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    int
    getDevNum()
    Returns the device number of the hardware instrument associated with the listener.
    default void
    receiveSysexMsg(SysexMessage sxMsg)
    Shorthand for receiveSysexMsg(sxMsg,-1).
    void
    receiveSysexMsg(SysexMessage sxMsg, long timeStamp)
    Called when a MIDI system exclusive message has been received.

  • Methodendetails

    • receiveSysexMsg

      void receiveSysexMsg(SysexMessage sxMsg, long timeStamp) throws InvalidMidiDataException
      Called when a MIDI system exclusive message has been received. Implementations may reject the message by throwing an exception.
      Parameter:
      sxMsg - The message
      timeStamp - TimeStamp the time-stamp for the message, in microseconds
      Löst aus:
      InvalidMidiDataException - if the message is rejected

    • receiveSysexMsg

      default void receiveSysexMsg(SysexMessage sxMsg) throws InvalidMidiDataException
      Shorthand for receiveSysexMsg(sxMsg,-1).
      Parameter:
      sxMsg - The message
      Löst aus:
      InvalidMidiDataException - if the message is rejected

    • getDevNum

      int getDevNum()
      Returns the device number of the hardware instrument associated with the listener. If the hardware instrument does not support device numbers, implementations should return 0.
